items.title: Contribute to the repo by creating an issue
items.description:
Steps to follow to post an internship on this repo:

1. Go to LinkedIn or any of the job boards that post Canadian internships. 
2. Find any Canadian internship that is not already in the list
3. Open an issue using the issue template "New Internship"
4. Wait for the issue to be approved 
5. That's it, and you will be added to the contributors list

Thank you in advance for contributing

items.title: New column for popular tag to help search
items.description:
given the recent changes in tech related to AI I'd suggest to have a way to figure out AI focused companies.

and in retrospective maybe it would be nice to have a column for popular tags

i give you a list of some possible tags based on chat gpt although i think this list could be improved 

this could be added to the top of the document so people could use it

`ai` `machine_learning` `data_science` `cloud` `devops` `cybersecurity` `frontend` `backend` `fullstack` `mobile` `ui_ux` `product_management` `qa_testing` `blockchain` `iot` `automation` `sustainability`

items.title: [Remote] Senior Web3/React.js Developer – Token Presale dApp
items.description:
🚨 We’re hiring a **Senior Web3/React.js Developer** to help us scale token sale app — a real-world token presale and staking platform that connects crypto with actual services like food preorders and loyalty rewards.

You’ll be joining a lean, focused team building the next phase of our dApp — including staking mechanics, on-chain rewards, and seamless user dashboards.

**Role Details:**
- **Position:** Senior Software Developer (Solidity / Frontend / Full Stack)
- **Tech Stack:** ethers.js, Solidity, React, TypeScript, Node.js, Vite
- **Work Type:** Fully Remote, async-friendly
- **Schedule:** Full-Time/Part-Time (Up to 40 hrs/week)
- **Compensation:** $120k–$250k/year USD equivalent (based on experience & specialization)

**What We’re Looking For:**
- Experienced blockchain devs with Solidity and smart contract expertise
- Engineers comfortable working across the stack — React.js/TypeScript + backend APIs
- Frontend developers with deep React.js/Next.js experience and Web3 integration exposure
- Clean, well-structured code habits and Git proficiency
- A team-first, async-friendly, product-focused mindset
- Experience working with existing codebases and iterating fast

NDA is required prior to codebase access and technical call.

If this sounds like something you’d enjoy working on, let’s connect. Apply here: https://www.metabytelabs.com/careers/web3-developer, and feel free to send any questions to 📩careers@metabytelabs.com.
Know someone who’s a fit? Referrals welcome at 📩referrals@metabytelabs.com.

items.title: Backend Engineer (Go) at Chatsheet - Remote (Taiwan-based candidates)
items.description:
Apply here: https://chatsheet.com/form/f9d7ca51-5f7c-414b-aeaa-d2f7de1da20b

# About Chatsheet
At Chatsheet, we’re offering 100,000 NTD/month—a highly competitive salary in Taiwan—to hire talented Go engineers who want to build AI that automates work by deeply understanding complex data, revolutionizing how businesses operate. As a USA-based early-stage startup, we’re lean, fast, and focused on delivering cutting-edge AI products like Chatsheet, which simplifies and automates workflows with AI. We’re hiring in Taiwan to tap into top talent, giving you a chance to join a dynamic team where your work directly shapes our product and impacts the world.
Why us? We’re not a traditional company with rigid hierarchies. At Chatsheet, you’ll work directly with our founder, tackle challenging problems, and build cool AI-powered solutions. If you’re a curious, driven engineer who wants ownership and impact, this is your shot, no matter your age. Whether you’re a young college grad with exceptional talent or an experienced pro, we’re open to anyone who can deliver.
# About the Team
Our Backend Engineering Team is the backbone of Chatsheet’s AI-driven platform. You’ll build and scale infrastructure, integrate with complex external systems, and create robust, high-performance services. We’re hands-on and end-to-end: you’ll brainstorm, design, code, test, and deploy. No ticket-fixing monotony here—just real engineering challenges that push you to grow.
We value speed, creativity, and results. You’ll have the freedom to experiment, propose solutions, and ship code that matters, all while collaborating closely with a small, sharp team and our founder. Half our team speaks Mandarin, so while strong English skills are required for clear communication, some discussions can happen in Mandarin for your comfort.
# About the Role
We’re hiring talented Go Backend Engineers in Taiwan who are excited to solve tough problems and build AI-driven systems at scale. You’ll work on integrations, distributed architectures, and performance-critical services that power Chatsheet’s mission to automate work. This is a remote role with flexible working hours, letting you work when you’re most productive. We welcome applicants of all ages—whether you’re a fresh college grad with a knack for coding or a seasoned engineer, we value talent and drive above all.
# Must-Haves
Strong Go (Golang) expertise: You write clean, efficient, and maintainable code.
Distributed systems experience: You’ve designed or maintained systems that scale horizontally.
Reliability & observability: You know how to build systems that are robust and easy to monitor.
Database skills: Hands-on experience with PostgreSQL or similar databases.
Strong English skills: Clear written and verbal communication is essential for collaboration with our global team.
# Nice-to-Haves
Familiarity with Docker & Kubernetes for containerized deployments.
Exposure to LLM APIs, embeddings, or RAG patterns—a bonus if you’ve dabbled in AI-related tech.
Passion for tackling messy, real-world integration challenges.
# Why Join Chatsheet?
High salary: Earn 100,000 NTD/month, highly competitive for Taiwan and a reflection of your value to us.
Remote & flexible: Work from anywhere in Taiwan with hours that suit your life.
Flat structure: No bureaucratic layers. Work directly with the founder and have your voice heard.
Challenging work: Solve hard, interesting problems in AI and automation, not repetitive tasks.
Ownership & impact: Your code shapes our product and reaches real users fast.
Growth opportunities: As an early-stage startup, your contributions will define your career trajectory.
Cool AI products: Build cutting-edge systems with AI at the core, including our flagship Chatsheet platform.
Multilingual team: Communicate primarily in English, with Mandarin as an option for some discussions.
Open to all ages: From young, talented college grads to experienced engineers, we hire based on skill and potential.
We’re not a 9–6 corporate grind. If you’re a smart, ambitious engineer who thrives on solving tough problems and wants to grow with a startup, Chatsheet is where you belong.
# Compensation & Benefits
Salary: 100,000 NTD per month—highly competitive for Taiwan.
Remote work: Full flexibility to work from anywhere in Taiwan.
Flexible hours: Choose a schedule that maximizes your productivity.
Startup environment: Fast-paced, with significant growth potential and direct impact.
# Interview Process
Application Review: Submit your CV and a short statement about exceptional work you’ve done.
Coding Take-Home Test: If you pass the application review, we’ll provide a straightforward coding test to showcase your Go skills and problem-solving ability.
# Ready to Build the Future?
If you’re a Go engineer in Taiwan with strong English skills, ready to ditch mundane work for real challenges, join us at Chatsheet. Whether you’re a young grad bursting with talent or an experienced coder, apply now and let’s build AI that changes how the world works.

# Apply Here
https://chatsheet.com/form/f9d7ca51-5f7c-414b-aeaa-d2f7de1da20b

📣 Vaga para Desenvolvedor Java em home office!

Cliente: Empresa Brasileira de Serviços Hospitalares.

🔧 Desenvolvimento em Java (Spring, JPA, Hibernate) e JavaScript (React, Node.js, Angular).
📊 Trabalho com Banco de Dados (PostgreSQL, MySQL, Oracle).

items.description:
# Hiring experienced Sr. Software Engineers at Turing! 🚀  
Apply Here: http://turing.com/s/DWBRdK

Turing is one of the fastest-growing AI companies, pushing the boundaries of AI-assisted software development.  
In this role, you’ll review AI-generated code, rank solutions, and provide feedback to improve how Large Language Models (LLMs) learn real-world coding best practices.

items.title: [Hibrido / Campinas, Brasil] Estágio em ITSM (Sustentação) na Coodesh
items.description:
## Descrição da vaga: Esta é uma vaga de um parceiro da plataforma Coodesh, ao candidatar-se você terá acesso as informações completas sobre a empresa e benefícios. Fique atento ao redirecionamento que vai te levar para uma url [https://coodesh.com](https://coodesh.com/jobs/copia-estagio-em-itsm-sustentacao-121747713?utm_source=github&utm_medium=devfsa-vagas&modal=open) para realizar a candidatura. 👋

Queremos simplificar a maneira como as empresas lidam com seus dados. Fazemos isso ao integrar qualquer app, dado ou device e ao gerar insights com uma visão 360° do negócio.

Somos movidos por desafios e queremos resolver os problemas mais complexos dos nossos clientes, sem pular a parte difícil.

Quer iniciar sua carreira em ITSM e aprender sobre atendimento de chamados em ambientes produtivos de integração que utilizam diversas tecnologias como API, ETL e Microsserviços?

Precisamos de uma pessoa para auxiliar, junto com nosso time, a:

  • Apoiar no monitoramento e análise do comportamento do ambiente do cliente;
  • Auxiliar na atualização de ferramentas de atendimento e monitoramento;
  • Participar da investigação de incidentes, auxiliando na identificação de causa raiz;
  • Contribuir na entrega de indicadores de atendimento e relatórios;
  • Acompanhar reuniões de passagem de conhecimento e revisão de código junto ao time de projetos.
## Digiage:

Vamos dar um rolê pelo que a gente faz? 🚀

1. Inovação e Qualidade: 

Veja mais no site ## Habilidades: - Java - PL/SQL - Linux - Azure - AWS - XML - JSON ## Local: Campinas, Brasil ## Requisitos: - Cursando ensino superior a partir do 8º semestre em Tecnologia da Informação, Sistemas de Informação, Ciência da Computação ou áreas correlatas - Residir em Campinas ou proximidades: Paulínia, Sumaré, Hortolândia, Nova Odessa, Americana, Santa Bárbara d'Oeste, Valinhos, Vinhedo, Monte Mor, Indaiatuba e Itatiba - Ter disponibilidade para estagiar das 09h00 às 16h00 - Noções básicas de linguagem de programação Java (para elaboração de pequenas melhorias e auxílio no troubleshooting); - Noções básicas de bancos de dados e consultas SQL (PL/SQL) - Conhecimento básico em sistemas operacionais Windows e Linux - Interesse em aprender sobre monitoramento e análise de ambientes de TI - Proatividade e vontade de aprender ## Diferenciais: - Inglês básico para leitura e participação em treinamentos - Familiaridade com ferramentas de monitoramento (Datadog, Zabbix, Grafana) ## Benefícios: - Reembolso de Certificações - Day off na semana do aniversário ## Como se candidatar: Candidatar-se exclusivamente através da plataforma Coodesh no link a seguir: [Estágio em ITSM (Sustentação) na Digiage](https://coodesh.com/jobs/copia-estagio-em-itsm-sustentacao-121747713?utm_source=github&utm_medium=devfsa-vagas&modal=open) Após candidatar-se via plataforma Coodesh e validar o seu login, você poderá acompanhar e receber todas as interações do processo por lá. Utilize a opção **Pedir Feedback** entre uma etapa e outra na vaga que se candidatou. Isso fará com que a pessoa **Recruiter** responsável pelo processo na empresa receba a notificação. ## Labels #### Alocação Alocado #### Regime Estágio #### Categoria Suporte Técnico

items.title: Lean Analyst
items.description:
Apply @ rahul.g@laibatechnology.com

**Position: Lean Analyst

Location: Houston, TX (Onsite)**

Exp: 6-15 Yrs
Must have oil ang gas domain background
The Lean analyst will play a key role in driving process improvement projects by helping to facilitate and plan workshops with the Lean specialists and client team, analyzing and presenting pertinent data in the appropriate format, developing metrics and measurement tools to improve operating processes toward greater efficiency and effectiveness in all areas of oil and gas (upstream, downstream, chemicals, pipeline, etc.)

Track and record all relevant data for global Lean program, and refresh data for accuracy on monthly basis including but not limited to Lean Practitioner (LP) count, LP status, LP certification progress, yield rate, functional/job family representation, LP office location/geography, project tracking metrics, value tracking metrics, etc.

Analyze performance data/metrics, and develop appropriate presentations and dashboard tools to demonstrate Lean performance to client, including but not limited to SmartSheets, PowerBI, Tableau

Develop and build relevant process documents at the request of Lean specialists leveraging Visio, Mural, Zoom Whiteboard or Powerpoint

Construct and manage Microsoft SharePoint site for global Lean program and serve as site Admin to manage data storage, restricted access requests, subsite construction, etc.

Design, develop, and build HTML code using standard webpage design software (e.g. Figma) for professional Lean website


Apply @ rahul.g@laibatechnology.com

items.title: AI Solution Architect
items.description:
Apply to [rahul.g@laibatechnology.com](mailto:rahul.g@laibatechnology.com)


**Role - AI Solution Architect 
Location - Remote, USA - PST time zone
Contract role** 

The AI Solution Architect will be responsible for translating complex business challenges into viable, scalable, and secure AI/ML solutions. This role requires a deep understanding of AI/ML methodologies, data architectures, cloud platforms, and software engineering best practices. The successful candidate will work closely with business stakeholders, data scientists, ML engineers, software developers, and IT operations teams to architect, guide, and ensure the successful delivery of AI-powered products and services.

years of experience in solution architecture, with at least [Y+] years specifically focused on designing and implementing AI/ML solutions in an enterprise environment. Proven expertise in designing and deploying end-to-end machine learning pipelines. Strong understanding of various AI/ML techniques and algorithms (e.g., supervised, unsupervised, reinforcement learning, deep learning, NLP, computer vision). Hands-on experience with at least one major cloud platform's AI/ML services (AWS, Azure, GCP). Proficiency in programming languages commonly used in AI/ML (e.g., Python, R, Java). Familiarity with MLOps principles and tools for continuous integration, deployment, and monitoring of ML models. Solid understanding of data governance, data quality, and data security principles. Excellent problem-solving, analytical, and critical thinking skills. Strong communication, presentation, and interpersonal skills, with the ability to influence and collaborate effectively across diverse teams. Preferred Qualifications: Experience with Generative AI models (LLMs, diffusion models) and related frameworks (e.g., LangChain, LlamaIndex). Experience with big data technologies (e.g., Spark, Hadoop, Kafka). Certifications in relevant cloud AI/ML platforms (e.g., AWS Certified Machine Learning Specialty, Google Cloud Professional Machine Learning Engineer). Experience with agile development methodologies


Apply to [rahul.g@laibatechnology.com](mailto:rahul.g@laibatechnology.com)

items.title: Electrical Equipment Test Engineer
items.description:
APPLY on :    Email: **rahul.g@laibatechnology.com**


****Position: Heavy Equipment Test Engineer
Location: Erie, PA (Onsite role)
Full time / Permanent / Annual Salary**** 


Roles & Responsibilities:

Perform all tests with minimum supervision, involving knowledge of power and control electronics, difficult circuits, electrical measurements, electrical theory and calculations, testing operations and data acquisition. 
Develop, setup, and execute assigned tests
Attend and contribute to reviews with leads, engineering, EHS, and others when necessary to review, update, approve and perform proposed functionality tests or similar changes 
Attend necessary safety and qualification training for working on electrical and mechanical test stands.
Work on and communicate effectively with a cross functional team of technicians, engineers and Safety personnel
Provide technical expertise as needed to ensure test needs are met
Ensure all assigned tests are performed and documented properly
Attend test review/planning meetings as needed

Work Experience

Required Skills:

Associates degree in Electrical or Electronics Technology or a related technical discipline from an accredited university or college (Or a High School Diploma / GED with a minimum of 2 years of Military Technical Training or Electrical/Test experiences)
Hands on electrical troubleshooting capability and experience
Understanding and ability to work with complicated electrical schematics, verbal instructions, and / or drawings 
Test Documentation writing/development capability and experience 
Strong computer skills (Word, Excel, Office, PowerPoint)
Ability to meet physical / safety standards for heavy equipment test operations
Ability to work weekends and/or on a rotating shift


Desired Skills:

A minimum of 1 year of work experience in a heavy equipment test related field
Knowledge of AC / DC theory, Digital Electronics, 3 phase power, electric motor mechanics, electric motor theory (AC/DC), rotating machinery testing, electrical and mechanical test instrumentation, and troubleshooting electrical, mechanical, and hydraulic systems
Knowledge and/or training on Pneumatic Systems
Ability to properly use and care for assigned tools and equipment
Ability to adhere to standards and do a quality job in a safe and timely manner
Ability to promote climate of cooperation, such as; leading by example mentoring others in Quality, Safety, Environmental, and Lean philosophies
Ability to rotate through all or most of the processes, rather than being assigned to a specific task
Ability to work as part of a team and perform all related duties
 

Physical Requirements & Work Environment:

Mostly heavy industrial test environment with work on high HP (1000 KVA), medium voltage (2 KV) and high current (10 KA) systems and heavy mechanical machinery.
Frequent requirement to lift up to 50 lbs., frequently required to walk, climb, bend, reach outward, and handle materials and tools. Occasionally required to sit, squat and/or kneel.
While performing duties on this job, the employee is exposed to wet or hot, humid conditions (non-weather); work near moving mechanical parts and vibration. The noise level is usually loud. The vision requirements include: close vision, distance vision, peripheral vision, depth perception and ability to adjust focus.
Substantial amounts of telephone and computer work.
Heavily Regulated Industries with strict adherence to procedures.
Flexibility to meet business deadlines by staying late or arriving early.
Varied Work Schedule to meet equipment delivery schedules. Weekend and rotating shift work.
Ability to use personal transportation to visit customer locations.


Email: rahul.g@laibatechnology.com

items.title: [徵才][台北] [AI 新創公司] [遠端為主] Senior Frontend and Backend Engineer 100w~140w
items.description:
## 【AHEAD 先勁智能】正在尋找資深後端工程師。

  薪資： 年薪 NT$ 1,000,000 - NT$ 1,400,000

## 歡迎投遞履歷
- 資深後端工程師: https://www.104.com.tw/job/8sezr

## 公司簡介 | AHEAD 官方網站
AHEAD 整合了臨床醫師、轉譯醫學、資料科學、機器學習及軟體開發等多領域專家，致力於開發有效的 AI 輔助診斷工具。首發產品「Cyto-copilot 雲端智能平台」專為血液癌症專業判讀需求而設計。
- AHEAD 官方網站 | Official Website
https://www.aheadmedicine.com/

## 媒體曝光
•	[2024台灣AI大賞｜7秒鐘找出異常細胞！先勁智能用AI加持判讀，成果登入聖經教科書](https://www.bnext.com.tw/article/79724/ahead-medicine--taiwan-impact-ai-award-2024)
•	[環球生技 116期焦點企業專訪: 先勁智能AI血癌檢驗平台寫下經典教科書](https://news.gbimonthly.com/tw/magazine/article_show.php?num=68041&menu=1479&p_id=124&fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAAR3rTrsPUmfpSYuasKVsCSAxtCF_8XBTlpZJ-FBnPG52IPt7W4_QYmc7Flg_aem_m8EsExRlk78dGDuflMfmtA)
•	[DIGITIMES AHEAD打造全面性AI臨床輔助系統](https://www.digitimes.com.tw/iot/article.asp?cat=158&id=0000572899_oqe7yvp3lapxh081lo4yc&fbclid=iwar2gyu05tgzc0obtt4ez6t88ox5yxwbjvpxb8dhappckwzzawx1uq8ttdpu)
•	[Meet Global AHEAD Intelligence uses AI to help doctors conquer blood cancer, skyrocket the speed of diagnostics 100 times faster](https://meet-global.bnext.com.tw/articles/view/47385)

## 公司福利
- 混合居家辦公(Hybrid Remote)：每週僅需進辦公室1-2次參與會議
- 員工認股權計畫
- 休假制度優於勞基法(額外三天幸福假)
- 現磨咖啡機提供，咖啡暢飲 充足供應的零食與飲料
- 不定期提供水果、甜點
- 定期團隊聚餐活動
- 教育訓練補助

## 建議準備事項
- 準備作品集或可分享的開源專案
- 熟悉自己過往專案的技術細節
- 了解我們公司的產品與技術棧
- 準備關於團隊合作的具體案例

items.title: [Remoto] Full Stack Blockchain Developer na Coodesh
items.description:
## Descrição da vaga: Esta é uma vaga de um parceiro da plataforma Coodesh, ao candidatar-se você terá acesso as informações completas sobre a empresa e benefícios. Fique atento ao redirecionamento que vai te levar para uma url [https://coodesh.com](https://coodesh.com/jobs/full-stack-blockchain-developer-144005799?utm_source=github&utm_medium=devfsa-vagas&modal=open) para realizar a candidatura. 👋

At Spectrum IT, we are building BrickVerse, a next-generation NFT marketplace designed to redefine how digital assets are created, traded, and experienced. Partnering with Brickken, our mission is to deliver an institutional-grade, highly scalable, and user-centric platform at the forefront of Web3 innovation.

To support this project, we’re looking to hire:

- 2 Blockchain Developers

- 2 Frontend Developers

- 2 Backend Developers

- 1 UX/UI Designer

- 1 DevOps Engineer

- 1 Project Manager

Why Join Us

This is an opportunity to build an industry-defining product from the earliest stage, with complete technical ownership, greenfield development, and deep architectural influence. You will join an experienced, cross-functional squad where your contributions directly shape the future of digital asset commerce.

Spectrum IT offers:

- Highly competitive salary + performance bonuses

- Remote-first culture with flexible working hours

- A supportive environment for continuous learning and Web3 innovation

- The chance to architect, own, and scale an enterprise-grade NFT marketplace

If you are confident in our project, please submit the following application: https://forms.gle/vnv4Bqvth2QvuJdJ8

Regards.

## Spectrum IT:

Established in 2008, Spectrum IT is a leading Software and Technology specific recruitment agency, providing permanent and contract IT resource for businesses. Our team of around 30 employees are based on the University of Southampton Science Park, a key hub for technology on the South Coast.

## Habilidades: - Normas Técnicas - Análise de software ## Local: Remota ## Como se candidatar: Candidatar-se exclusivamente através da plataforma Coodesh no link a seguir: [Full Stack Blockchain Developer na Spectrum IT](https://coodesh.com/jobs/full-stack-blockchain-developer-144005799?utm_source=github&utm_medium=devfsa-vagas&modal=open) Após candidatar-se via plataforma Coodesh e validar o seu login, você poderá acompanhar e receber todas as interações do processo por lá. Utilize a opção **Pedir Feedback** entre uma etapa e outra na vaga que se candidatou. Isso fará com que a pessoa **Recruiter** responsável pelo processo na empresa receba a notificação. ## Labels #### Alocação Remoto #### Categoria Full-Stack
